scene_input.scene_summary: Bilal looks surprised at the Prophet's friendly approach.

schema_output.scene_summary: Bilal looks surprised at the Prophet's friendly approach.
schema_output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, p. 265
schema_output.moral_lesson: The importance of a friendly and approachable attitude in spreading the message of Islam

characters.name: The Prophet
characters.appearance: medium build, dignified upright posture, wearing a flowing white thobe with a distinctive deep green woolen cloak draped over both shoulders and a white turban with a cloth tail hanging between the shoulder blades

characters.name: Bilal
characters.appearance: young man, wearing a simple white thobe and a plain brown woolen cloak

schema_output.narrative_text: Bilal was surprised when the Prophet approached him with a friendly smile. The Prophet wanted to get to know Bilal better and learn more about his thoughts.
schema_output.image_prompt: Children's watercolor storybook illustration, soft warm hand-painted style for ages 6-12. Interior of the early 7th century mosque in Makkah with a simple dome-shaped structure and a flat roof. Late afternoon golden sunlight streams through a small window on the right, casting warm rays across the room. In the center of the room stands a tall, slender man, the central figure seen entirely from behind: medium build, dignified upright posture, wearing a flowing white thobe with a distinctive deep green woolen cloak draped over both shoulders and a white turban with a cloth tail hanging between the shoulder blades, standing with his hands clasped behind his back, radiating a sense of calm and approachability. On the left, a young man with a look of mild surprise on his face, wearing a simple white thobe and a plain brown woolen cloak, sits on a woven palm-fiber mat, his eyes widened in surprise, his head slightly tilted to the side. Soft warm golden light, intimate and peaceful mood. Medium close shot at eye level. Warm beige, cream, and golden palette with the deep green cloak as a color anchor. No modern objects, historically accurate 7th century scene.
